headerDisplay: For help getting these values, please see the readme at: https://github.com/potmat/homebridge-google-nest-sdm#where-do-the-config-values-come-from Read it carefully, you must follow the instructions regarding the authorization URL if you want events to work properly.

fanDuration.title: Fan duration (in seconds) when turning on the fan.

analyzeDuration.title: FFmpeg Analyze Duration (microseconds)
analyzeDuration.description: Maximum time (in microseconds) FFmpeg will probe the stream to detect its parameters before giving up. FFmpeg stops as soon as it has detected the stream, so this is an upper bound, not a fixed delay. Defaults to 15000000 (15 seconds), the plugin's long-standing value. Lowering it can surface stuck streams faster, but setting it too low can cause copy-codec streams to fail to start (FFmpeg never learns the video dimensions). Only change this if you know your camera delivers a keyframe quickly.

probeSize.title: FFmpeg Probe Size (bytes)
probeSize.description: Maximum number of bytes FFmpeg will read while probing the stream to detect its parameters. FFmpeg stops as soon as it has detected the stream, so this is an upper bound, not a fixed amount. Defaults to 100000000 (100 MB), the plugin's long-standing value. Setting it too low can cause copy-codec streams to fail to start (FFmpeg never learns the video dimensions).
